description: Ponke (PONKE) emerged in late 2023 on Solana as a chaotic fusion of anime absurdity, meme culture, and pure community rebellion, growing into a symbol of anti-establishment Web3 energy. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 PONKE gives PONKE holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, and a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Ponke
